# IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode.memoryBased

**Case**

The scanned data is returned to the delegate as a `NSData` object.

## Declaration

```swift
case memoryBased
```

## Constants

- **IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode.fileBased**: The scanned content will be saved to the specified download directory.
